subcodes.first_line: I remember My handmaiden who believed when she heard His most sweet call, and turned unto Him, and attained unto His wise remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری امتی التی آمنت اذ سمعت ندائه الاحلی و اقبلت و فازت بذکره الحکیم انا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
